3GPP Protocol Flows

Brought to you by Babak

Explore 5G and 6G networks from the ground up — start with guided learning modules, then step through protocol flows message by message, from registration and PDU sessions to AI-RAN, intent-based slicing, and digital twins. Interactive sequence diagrams with real 3GPP payloads, topology views, glossaries, and in-depth reference pages. No logins, no install, no tracking. Just open and explore.

Built for network engineers, architects, and anyone working with 3GPP specifications — whether you're debugging a call flow, studying for certification, or designing next-gen systems.

2 Interactive Explorers · 10 Learning Modules · 34 Protocol Flows · 240+ Glossary Terms · 12 Reference Pages

5G Deployed

5G SA Interactive Explorer

The complete 5G Standalone core — learn from the ground up with 5 introductory modules (what 5G is, how it differs from 4G, network functions, interfaces, and 5G Advanced), then step through 20 interactive protocol flows across registration, PDU sessions, mobility, edge computing (ULCL), network slicing, VoNR, SMS, analytics, and converged charging. Every step shows real 3GPP JSON payloads with inline annotations.

5 learning modules · 20 flows · 5 domains · 120+ glossary terms · 6 reference pages
↗
6G Exploring

6G & AI-RAN Interactive Explorer

Learn the evolution from 5G to 6G with 5 introductory modules (the road to 6G, what AI-RAN is, AI-RAN vs. traditional gNB, what 6G is, and key 6G technologies), then step through AI-RAN and 6G AI-native flows — intent-based slicing, autonomous scaling, ISAC sensing, digital twins, and AI-driven charging. Uses FACT / VALIDATED / PROJECTED / VISION badges to distinguish deployed technology from forward-looking concepts.

5 learning modules · 14 flows · 3 domains · 160+ glossary terms · 6 reference pages
Not affiliated with 3GPP · For educational use
